title: dryopteris affinis f. valongensis
intro: Dryopteris affinis f. valongensis, also known as the Vallant's scaly male fern, is a plant species that belongs to the Dryopteris genus of ferns. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of using Dryopteris affinis f. valongensis include its ability to aid in the healing of wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and even lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
